children.text: Who we are
Insurhi is an independent insurance education and comparison site. We explain coverage trade-offs in plain language and link readers to practical guides, claims checklists, and glossary definitions.
Editorial principles
Methodology first: we document how products and guides are researched in our public methodology page.
No paid placement: carriers cannot buy rankings. Affiliate relationships, when present, are disclosed and do not change editorial order.
Category accuracy: auto, home, life, pet, Medicare, and renters content is written separately—no mixed advice.
Scenario-based guidance: deep guides include real claim and buying scenarios, not generic SEO filler.
Corrections
Found an error? Email editorial@insurhi.com with the page URL and what looks wrong. We aim to review and publish corrections within 48 hours on material factual issues.

seo.metaTitle: About Insurhi | Independent Insurance Guides
seo.metaDescription: Learn how Insurhi researches insurance guides and product comparisons: editorial principles, independence, and our 48-hour correction policy.

children.text: Get in touch
Use editorial@insurhi.com for content corrections, methodology questions, or partnership inquiries related to insurance education—not for binding quotes or legal advice.
What to include
The full page URL you are referencing.
A short description of the issue or question.
Screenshots or policy excerpts if relevant (remove personal account numbers).
Response time
We respond to correction requests within two business days and publish verified fixes within 48 hours when a material factual error is confirmed.
What we cannot do
Insurhi does not sell insurance, bind coverage, or provide individualized legal or financial advice. For policy decisions, contact a licensed agent or your state department of insurance.

seo.metaTitle: Contact Insurhi | Editorial & Corrections
seo.metaDescription: Contact the Insurhi editorial team for content corrections and methodology questions. We review factual issues within 48 hours.

children.text: This page explains how Insurhi reviews insurance products, providers, and claims content. Our goal is to give consumers transparent, reproducible comparisons—not paid placements or vague rankings.
What we evaluate
Coverage clarity: what is insured, key exclusions, and which scenarios matter to typical readers.
Pricing context: ranges and scenarios rather than a single headline number, so readers can map cost to their situation.
Claim experience: workflow expectations, documented SLA behavior, and common reasons for delay or denial.
Consumer suitability: who each option fits and who should look elsewhere—no universal winners.
How we score
Each product is evaluated on the four dimensions above with consistent rubrics across the same insurance category.
Scores are derived from public filings, regulatory disclosures, insurer documentation, and structured user feedback.
We do not weight products higher because of advertising, partnerships, or referral relationships.
Where our data comes from
Insurer policy documents, declarations pages, and product brochures.
Public state insurance department filings and regulator complaint summaries.
Industry reports and verified consumer surveys; we cite sources with publication dates.
Editor-conducted scenario testing (quote sampling, claim workflow walkthroughs) where applicable.
How often we update
Buying guides and methodology: reviewed at least every 12 months and after material market changes.
Product pages: reviewed at least every 6 months; pricing context refreshed when carriers publish new filings.
Claims guides: reviewed at least every 12 months; updated promptly when regulators change procedures.
Each article shows its last-updated date so readers can judge timeliness at a glance.
Independence and disclosures
Rankings and recommendations are independent from advertising and partnerships.
When affiliate or partner relationships exist, they are disclosed in a clearly labeled notice.
We never accept payment in exchange for a higher score, ranking position, or hidden product placement.
Editorial standards
We avoid absolute claims like ‘guaranteed lowest price’ or ‘100% claim approval.’
We do not fabricate user reviews or rating distributions.
We separate facts (limits, exclusions, filings) from editorial interpretation.
We invite corrections; readers can email editorial@insurhi.com and we aim to review within 48 hours.
Limitations to keep in mind

Insurance products vary by state, age, vehicle, property, and personal history. Our content is educational and does not replace official policy wording, a licensed agent's advice, or your insurer's underwriting decision. Always read the full policy and confirm coverage before purchase.
Reach the editorial team
Have a correction, data tip, or methodology question? Email editorial@insurhi.com. We acknowledge corrections in the article footer when accepted.

seo.metaTitle: Editorial Methodology | Insurhi Insurance Reviews
seo.metaDescription: How Insurhi evaluates insurance: coverage clarity, pricing context, claim experience, and suitability. Independent rankings, public sources, and update cadence.

children.text: Last updated: April 23, 2026.
Insurhi is a platform-style insurance information and comparison website. This Privacy Policy explains what data we collect, why we collect it, how we use it, and what rights you have.
1. Scope of this policy

This policy applies to data processed through our website, forms, product comparison pages, claims guidance pages, and related support communications. It does not replace the privacy policies of insurers, brokers, or third-party partners linked from our platform.
2. Information we collect
Information you provide directly: name, email, phone number, insurance interests, and form submissions.
Technical and usage data: IP address, browser type, device data, page views, click paths, and approximate location.
Transaction and interaction data: quote requests, provider/product clicks, and support request history.
Compliance and security data: logs for abuse prevention, fraud detection, and legal record-keeping.
3. How we use your information
Operate and improve core platform functions, including category pages, guides, and claims support content.
Personalize on-site recommendations for relevant insurance topics and product pathways.
Measure performance, including SEO engagement, feature usage, and conversion-entry click quality.
Prevent misuse, investigate suspicious activity, and maintain service security and availability.
Comply with legal and regulatory obligations that apply to platform operators.
4. Legal bases for processing
Legitimate interests: analytics, fraud prevention, service quality, and platform reliability.
Contract or pre-contract steps: responding to user requests and facilitating provider handoff paths.
Consent: optional cookies, marketing communications, and region-specific consent requirements.
Legal obligation: records, audits, and lawful requests from authorities where required.
5. Cookies and similar technologies

We use essential cookies for core functionality and may use analytics/performance cookies to understand site behavior. Where required by law, non-essential cookies are used only after consent. You can manage cookie preferences in your browser settings.
6. Platform model and third-party sharing

As a platform website, Insurhi may route users to external insurer or partner pages. We may share limited interaction metadata necessary to attribute referrals, measure campaign quality, or support requested services.
Insurers, providers, and product partners for user-requested journeys.
Infrastructure and analytics vendors under contractual safeguards.
Legal or regulatory recipients when disclosure is legally required.
We do not sell personal information in exchange for direct monetary payment.
7. Data retention

We keep personal data only as long as needed for the purposes described in this policy, including service operation, legal compliance, dispute resolution, and security controls. Retention periods vary by data type and legal requirements.
8. Your rights
Request access to personal data we hold about you.
Request correction of inaccurate or incomplete information.
Request deletion where applicable under law.
Object to or restrict certain processing activities.
Request data portability where legally applicable.
Withdraw consent for consent-based processing at any time.
To exercise rights, contact us using the details below. We may need to verify your identity before processing requests.
9. Data security and integrity

We use reasonable technical and organizational safeguards to protect personal data, including access controls, monitoring, and incident response procedures. No internet transmission or storage system can be guaranteed 100 percent secure.
10. Children's privacy
Our platform is not directed to children under the age required by applicable law. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children without appropriate authorization.
11. International data transfers
If data is transferred across jurisdictions, we use appropriate safeguards consistent with applicable data protection laws.
12. Policy updates
We may update this Privacy Policy as our platform evolves or legal requirements change. Material changes will be reflected by an updated effective date on this page.
13. Contact us
For privacy inquiries or rights requests, contact: privacy@insurhi.com

children.text: Effective date: April 23, 2026.
These Terms of Service govern your access to and use of Insurhi, a platform-style insurance information and comparison website. By using this website, you agree to these terms.
1. Platform role and service scope

Insurhi provides educational content, product and provider discovery paths, and claims-related guidance. We are a platform operator and do not act as your insurer, underwriter, broker, legal advisor, or financial advisor unless explicitly stated in a separate written agreement.
2. No guarantee of coverage or pricing

Insurance availability, policy terms, premiums, and claim outcomes are determined by third-party insurers or partners. Content on this website is for general informational purposes and does not constitute a binding offer or guarantee.
3. User eligibility and account responsibilities
You must use the platform lawfully and provide accurate information in forms and requests.
You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of any account credentials you use.
You must promptly notify us of unauthorized use or suspected security incidents.
4. Acceptable use

You agree not to abuse, interfere with, reverse engineer, scrape at abusive rates, or otherwise misuse the platform. We may suspend or restrict access to protect users, partners, and service integrity.
5. Third-party links and partner services

Our platform may link to insurers, providers, and partner sites. Those services are controlled by third parties and subject to their own terms and privacy policies. Insurhi is not responsible for third-party content, availability, or decisions.
6. Privacy and data handling

Your use of the website is also subject to our Privacy Policy, which describes how data is collected, used, shared, and retained in a platform context. By using this website, you acknowledge those practices.
7. Intellectual property

All platform branding, content structure, editorial frameworks, and site materials are owned by Insurhi or licensed to us. You may not reproduce or distribute site content beyond personal, non-commercial use without permission.
8. Disclaimers
The service is provided on an as-is and as-available basis.
We do not warrant uninterrupted availability, completeness, or error-free operation at all times.
Users should verify critical insurance terms directly with providers before purchase decisions.
9. Limitation of liability

To the maximum extent permitted by law, Insurhi and its affiliates are not liable for indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of or inability to use the platform.
10. Indemnification
You agree to indemnify and hold harmless Insurhi from claims, liabilities, and expenses resulting from your misuse of the platform, violation of these terms, or infringement of third-party rights.
11. Compliance and regulatory cooperation
We may preserve or disclose information when reasonably necessary to comply with legal obligations, enforce platform policies, prevent fraud, or protect rights, safety, and security.
12. Modifications to services or terms
We may update platform features and these Terms from time to time. Continued use after updates become effective constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.
13. Governing law and dispute handling

These terms are governed by applicable laws of the jurisdiction designated by Insurhi operations, unless otherwise required by mandatory local law. Disputes should first be raised through our contact channel for resolution.
14. Contact
For legal or policy questions about these Terms, contact: legal@insurhi.com
